Home CHAR 1 Demographic information: residential history prior to entry - prior stay at this nursing home. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown
79 AB5B AB5B_PRIOR_OTH_NF (AB5B) Stay in Other Nursing Home CHAR 1 Demographic information: residential history prior to entry - prior stay in other nursing home. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown
80 AB5C AB5C_OTH_RF (AB5C) Other Residential Facility CHAR 1 Demographic information: residential history prior to entry - other residential facility. 0 = No, 1 = Yes,
